name: Warren 2020
subject: We need all hands on deck
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Elizabeth is in this fight all the way, but she needs our help. With a crucial fundraising deadline coming up in less than two weeks, we need all hands on deck to stay on track for the end of the... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529fdb/45c30650/13658839b/668be694/1082885265/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Last night, in the tradition of Frances Perkins and generations of women who organized and persisted for change, Elizabeth laid out a case for how we can achieve big, structural change in America.

Her message was clear: **If we stick together and continue to build a grassroots movement, that 's how we'll win in 2020.**

Elizabeth is in this fight all the way, but she needs our help. With a crucial fundraising deadline coming up in less than two weeks, we need all hands on deck to stay on track for the end of the month.

**[Can you chip in anything you can for the first time today to help keep up the fight across the country? Chipping in before this month's FEC deadline will really make a difference.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529fdb/45c30650/13658839b/668be699/1082885265/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1OEZfRUdSX0dSTV9XXzIwMTkwOTE3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ58F_EGR_GRM_W_20190917_V1S2_P")**

>
From canceling student loan debt for 42 million people, to providing universal child care for every child in America from birth to school age, to passing sweeping anti-corruption reform, it's clear: Elizabeth has a plan to level the playing field.

But it's a team effort. We can only win and fight for big, structural change if we're all in this together -- and that's why we're asking for your help.

**[The FEC deadline is less than two weeks away and it's important that we hit our fundraising goal before then. Can you chip in $3 for the first time today?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529fdb/45c30650/13658839b/668be699/1082885265/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1OEZfRUdSX0dSTV9XXzIwMTkwOTE3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ58F_EGR_GRM_W_20190917_V1S2_P")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren

P.S. Elizabeth will be talking about her vision for America tonight on the Rachel Maddow Show and the Late Show with Stephen Colbert. Tune in tonight -- and then **[chip in for the first time to help power this movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28529fdb/45c30650/13658839b/668be699/1082885265/VEsHAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LTIwMTlxM2ZyIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUo1OEZfRUdSX0dSTV9XXzIwMTkwOTE3X1YxUzJfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-2019q3fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMJ58F_EGR_GRM_W_20190917_V1S2_P")**

name: Cory Booker
subject: We didn't make it, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- I'm sorry to be emailing you again, but it's important. Last night was the deadline for our $250,000 goal, and we fell $29,792 short. We already fell short once this quarter. And with the FEC fundraising deadline quickly approaching, now is not the time to do it again. [**Will you chip in right now to help us raise the remaining $29,792 of our goal by tonight, September 17th, at 11:59 p.m.?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190917_CB_20190917-fr-CB-fellshort9-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Team, this was an ambitious goal -- the third quarter is historically the toughest time for fundraising. It's probably why you've noticed myself and other candidates writing to you so often. But our campaign has seen real momentum since the last debate, and we need to show the people that this underdog campaign can keep it up through the end of the quarter and all the way to next November. **I 've asked you before, but now is the time I really need you to stand with me.** [**So please, team, help us reach our $250,000 mid-month goal by 11:59 p.m. tonight to keep us on track.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190917_CB_20190917-fr-CB-fellshort9-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We can't do it without you,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190917_CB_20190917-fr-CB-fellshort9-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd4/5fca0d19/741b6d00/291e70e4/3211059067/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd4/5fca0d19/741b6d00/291e70e3/3211059067/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd4/5fca0d19/741b6d00/291e70e2/3211059067/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd4/5fca0d19/741b6d00/291e70e1/3211059067/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd4/5fca0d19/741b6d00/291e70e0/3211059067/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd4/5fca0d19/741b6d00/291e70e4/3211059067/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Team Yang
subject: BIG NEWS: New California Poll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
[ Andrew ]Andrew Yang for President A new Emerson poll shows us in 4th place with 7% support in California [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1001&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]Chip in to keep up our momentum Yang Gang, Have you seen the latest poll from Emerson? We are now at 7% -- fourth place in California. We are coming out of the debate strong and picking up steam at record pace. [3]Emerson Polling graph of 2020 California Democratic Primary. California, September 13-16, 2019, Democratic Primary Voters, MM, N = 424, +/-4.7%. Biden 26%, Sanders 26%, Warren 20%, Yang 7%, Harris 6%, O'Rourke 5%, Buttigieg 4%, Gabbard 2%, Booker 1%, Castro 1%, Steyer 1%, Klobuchar 0%, Bullock 0%, Delaney 0%, Williamson 0%, Ryan 0%, Bennet 0%, Messam 0%, Sestak 0%, de Blasio 0%, Someone Else 1% [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1009&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]We need to capitalize on our momentum. Can you donate now to help power our campaign? If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]$10 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]$25 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1006&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]$50 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1005&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]$100 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1004&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]$250 » [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1003&amount=25&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]OTHER » As Andrew’s been saying for the entirety of this campaign, the Yang Gang is strong and only growing stronger. We will continue to grow and peak at the right time. Now it’s our job to make sure the rest of the country -- especially folks in the early primary states -- sees what Californians are starting to realize: * Andrew Yang is the candidate who is best equipped to defeat Donald Trump. * He’s the only candidate who understands what automation and the 4th Industrial Revolution will mean for our society -- and he knows how to prepare Americans for it. * He’s the only candidate focused on solving the problems that got Donald Trump elected, which is why 10% of Trump voters say they will vote for Andrew. This is the moment we’ve been waiting for. We’re picking up steam right as voters are beginning to tune into this election. Let's go, Team Yang Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is. [ https://act.yang2020.com/go/9612?t=1002&akid=389%2E377263%2ELEbhAN ]Contribute Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang


You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.

name: Team Sestak
subject: Did you see? NEW DATE! JOIN PRESIDENTIAL CANDIDATE, Admiral Joe Sestak, FOR AN IMPORTANT EVENING ABOUT AMERICA'S FUTURE - Monday, September 23
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Friend,

Twitter-fed presidential leadership, an economy on the brink of potential recession, and a nation fighting terrorism around the world -- our nation is yearning for a leader who will combat/address these fears.

Come hear Admiral Joe Sestak's credible plans to solve our issues, restore trust and accountability, and unite our nation.

The reception is on Monday, September 23 at 5:30pm at van der Veen, O'Neill, Hartshorn and Levin – located at 1219 Spruce Street in Philadelphia.

To RSVP and donate online please click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception092319] . To RSVP and contribute at the reception, email reception@joesestak.com.

If you cannot attend, please contribute online here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception092319] or by a check made out to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302. And thank you for contributing by September 30 as this is the quarter-end.

Thank you and Joe hopes to see you on September 23!

Respectfully,
Team Sestak

------------------------

NEW DATE: Monday, September 23

In a time of uncertainty, with Twitter-fed presidential leadership, an economy on the brink of potential recession and a Nation fighting terrorism around the world, spend the evening with one of our Country's true leaders, and envision a bold future.

Join Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
at a Fundraiser on Monday, September 23
hosted by Edward F. Chacker and Michael T. Van Der Deen

•Former 3-star Admiral; commander of aircraft carrier battle group
•Interacted with Presidents, Parliamentary Members, and leaders of Ministries
•President Clinton’s Director of Defense Policy; head of Navy’s Strategic Anti-Terrorism Unit
•PhD in Political Economy & Government and Masters in Public Administration from Harvard
•Former U.S. Congressman; Vice Chairman, Small Business Committee; most productive Congressperson in his class; saved over 800 homes from foreclosure
•Elected and re-elected (by 20 points) in a 2-1 Republican Congressional District
•Challenged former Republican Senator Arlen Specter and won the primary, after being 40 points down.

Joe launched his presidential campaign on June 23 in Iowa. Only 5 weeks later he was polling at #9.

The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[Joe] impresses with experience, smarts and discipline...” and the National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race.

Joe’s growing coalition is bringing together Democrats, Independents and Republicans, appealing to a sense of greater national purpose, above party, to heal our nation’s soul. He believes that a nation that can “disagree well” is a nation that can begin to overcome its rifts and tackle our greatest challenges.

Please come and learn more about Joe’s plans to restore trust, unity and accountability in the nation.

Monday, September 23 at 5:30 p.m.
van der Veen, O'Neill, Hartshorn and Levin
1219 Spruce Street
Philadelphia, PA 19107
Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250
To RSVP and/or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception092319]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing
a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Questions or to RSVP (and contribute at the reception): Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0a57a209-9dd9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68/a0e101e8-f6d9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMGUxMDFlOC1mNmQ5LWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MEHVJnOvS_01rlY7lJ8mINxyjNKaesDEjC6gk9eQodU=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

Peter, We have a really important project that you can be a part of. We are committing to register 37,000 voters in one of the most critical battleground districts in the country. This district is changing — and fast. Houston and Austin are among the fastest growing cities in the country. When the Republicans gerrymandered the Texas 10th, they had no idea it would look like this today. The GOP is scared. They have pledged $10 million to increase Republican turnout — we need to fight back. [**This is where you come in. We have a brand new tool that lets you support the registration of voters right here in Texas 10. Help us get to our goal of 37,000 new registered voters and support the blue wave here in Texas.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10045537/100405102/-2075307512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGU5OWU3OS0xYmRhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S1nlRkXTpldoWiZ09xpmdxKrfxxZL8j9u-cEQiJRqAo=&emci=c14612f3-1ada-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=80e99e79-1bda-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10045538/100405104/-2075307512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGU5OWU3OS0xYmRhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S1nlRkXTpldoWiZ09xpmdxKrfxxZL8j9u-cEQiJRqAo=&emci=c14612f3-1ada-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=80e99e79-1bda-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
Last election, we registered nearly 9,000 voters. Our voter registration and turnout efforts helped elect Democrats in two Texas House races. This work is how we change the game here in Texas. Texas is not a red state — Texas is a non-voting state. This is how we change that. When we register these 37,000 targets, we will be able to hold those two Texas House seats, elect Democrats in city and county elections, and help the Senate and presidential nominees compete statewide. And of course, most directly, we can send Rep. McCaul to an early retirement. [**Your donation will go directly to registering these key target voters. We will mail registration packets, follow up until each registration is filed, and then turn folks out on Election Day. You can use our tool to register as many voters as you choose. Consider registering the precinct you live in — or if you don’t live in TX-10 but want to see a Blue Texas — choose some voters to register today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10045539/100405106/-2075307512?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MGU5OWU3OS0xYmRhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S1nlRkXTpldoWiZ09xpmdxKrfxxZL8j9u-cEQiJRqAo=&emci=c14612f3-1ada-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=80e99e79-1bda-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Pancakes or waffles?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Will you join me for breakfast? |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=4a45717ff50a93df697f7580fe2c213e80accef511cde0929855701b463bff05e2b02d0f6aabdc2a5108c1847c42e1c85e61f49d8ab67490)
---

Friend,

It's been over four years since I took my famous escalator ride at **Trump Tower in New York City** to announce that I was running for President of the United States. Now, I'm going back to where it all began.

**I 'm having a special breakfast in beautiful NYC at the end of September and I want YOU to be my VIP ALL-ACCESS guest. **

---
| I told my team I wanted to bring someone who has been by my side from the very beginning, and I couldn't think of anyone more LOYAL or supportive than you.

We'll cover the flight, hotel, and meal for you and a guest of your choice. We can even take a photo together - all you have to do is show up.
---
|

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Our carrier battlegroups cannot survive in the Persian Gulf
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10045938/100406815/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcxODk5Zi0xY2RhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9H2oPJtL-icqV6vhoCK56euSmDWgXTEAZ7WfDKCtOw=&emci=2e78e8d7-aad9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=6671899f-1cda-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&v=hCcsNIISiWo)**
Peter,
I talked to Newsmax ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10045939/100406816/-163811777?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcxODk5Zi0xY2RhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9H2oPJtL-icqV6vhoCK56euSmDWgXTEAZ7WfDKCtOw=&&emci=2e78e8d7-aad9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=)) about the crisis in the Middle East between Saudi Arabia and Iran: if there is **a war against Iran, it would make previous U.S. military campaigns in the Middle East look "like a cake walk**... **neither Mr. Trump nor Democrats understand ****—**** because they haven’t operated there ****—**** that our carrier battlegroups cannot survive in the Persian Gulf."**

"Iranian coastal defenses would likely render the entire Persian Gulf off limits to U.S. Navy warships. Iran’s advanced surface-to-air missile defenses would be a significant threat to U.S. pilots," I told Newsmax, and we risk “hundreds of missiles that rain down on bases in Bahrain and Qatar that are ours, as well as Israel.”
The issue with using military force is "how wisely do you use it — and don’t get into another tragic misadventure like Iraq... If you’re going to use our military, you’d better know how it’s going to end before you decide it’s wise to begin."
**[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10045940/100406817/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcxODk5Zi0xY2RhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9H2oPJtL-icqV6vhoCK56euSmDWgXTEAZ7WfDKCtOw=&refcode=em09182019iran)**
**We had fixed Iran’s nuclear weapon-making capability, then broke our word on the Iran nuclear accord. Now we think our military is going to fix it again? No: militaries can stop a problem, but they cannot fix a problem. There is an absence of this understanding in the White House and among the Democratic Party's slate of fine candidates, who lack the depth and breadth of global experience we need to avoid and prevent catastrophes like Iraq — which one candidate even voted for — and now, possibly, Iran. We saw it in the last presidential debate. **
**It was our nation’s investment that prepared me to be Commander-in-Chief. Please help me get my message out to the country.**
[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10045941/100406819/1036341175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcxODk5Zi0xY2RhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9H2oPJtL-icqV6vhoCK56euSmDWgXTEAZ7WfDKCtOw=&refcode=em09182019iran)
Respectfully,
Joe Sestak

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/2e78e8d7-aad9-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68/6671899f-1cda-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjcxODk5Zi0xY2RhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P9H2oPJtL-icqV6vhoCK56euSmDWgXTEAZ7WfDKCtOw=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

name: Mike Franken
subject: FWD: I just made my second donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We're closing in on our goal of monthly donors. Did you see S. Harris' email yesterday about how easy it is to invest in the race monthly? Help us hit our goal before the end of September.
|
---
Friends -- I was touched when my friend S. Harris committed to join the campaign as a monthly donor and grateful that he shared his story. **[Will you join him with a recurring gift before the end of September?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245f/33365068/4a666303/3f8baafd/1210697236/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190918_em&recurring=1&amount=10")** We're counting on those monthly gifts to help set our budget, meaning they're just as easy for us to count on as for you to invest. We'll be looking to re-invest those gifts to build our grassroots organization.If you haven't had a chance yet, please take a minute to review my friend's email below about how easy it is to become a monthly donor. -- V/r mtf \----------Forwarded Message--------- From: S. Harris
Date: Tue, Sep 17, 2019
Subject: I just made my second donation
| | Friends -- I know that Mike Franken is a leader with integrity -- that's why I decided to support his campaign from day one. Now, without any effort, I've already made my second donation. | [Donate $10 Monthly](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f245f/33365068/4a666303/3f8baafe/1210697236/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franken-recurring-sept?refcode=20190918_em_bottom_button&recurring=1&amount=10")

When Mike mentioned that his campaign needed 100 monthly donors, I offered to share how easy it was for me.
I've known Mike for years, and I know that he will be the kind of senator who prioritizes what's right for our nation and our future. Rather than the hassle of writing a big check, we set a budget in our family for the support we could afford every month and committed to the campaign.
Now, without any additional effort, I've already made my second donation. That means Mike and his team can plan ahead and make smart investments with my support, and I was able to plan ahead to support him.

subject: Get to Know Brian Mast: Combat Veteran & Congressman
body:
Get to know Congressman Brian Mast, and you'll meet an extraordinary American with an exceptional story. This combat veteran and member of Congress... | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=1acd9bb3d6&u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2b1a06d496)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b8d4c56a7&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| **Get to Know Brian Mast:**
Congressman, Combat Vet & Fall Dinner Special Guest Get to know Congressman Brian Mast, and you'll meet an extraordinary American with an exceptional story. This combat veteran and member of Congress has given so much for our country, and he'll be telling his story right here in Indiana next month at the [2](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=76ca32df5c&e=1acd9bb3d6)[019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinner](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=73409dfd16&e=1acd9bb3d6).

Prior to being elected to Congress, Congressman Mast chose to follow in his father's footsteps and joined the U.S. Army. He served our country in uniform for 12 years, earning The Bronze Star Medal, The Army Commendation Medal for Valor, The Purple Heart Medal and The Defense Meritorious Service Medal.

**Congressman Mast was deployed to Afghanistan in 2010 as a bomb disposal expert, and then came the day that changed his life forever. An improvised explosive device (IED) detonated and resulted in life-changing injuries, which included the loss of both of his legs. **

But Congressman Mast didn't let this incident stop him from serving his country. After retiring from the Army, he continued working in counter-terrorism and national defense to keep Americans safe. And he continues that mission today in the U.S. House of Representatives.

**Brian Mast is a true American hero. To hear him tell his story -- and to hear from fellow Congressmen and combat vets Dan Crenshaw and Jim Baird -- [RSVP now for the 2019 Team Holcomb Fall Dinne](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a351bfdbab&e=1acd9bb3d6)[r](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=a3ec97681a&e=1acd9bb3d6). Tickets are selling quickly, so make sure you don't miss out!**

---
| [Click here to RSVP for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner!](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3ca07ff6e8&e=1acd9bb3d6 "Click here to RSVP for the Team Holcomb Fall Dinner!")

name: Cory Booker
subject: re: We didn't make it, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I'm sorry to email you again, but we're so close to reaching our mid-month goal. My team tells me we're less than $18,293 away. I need your help if we want to stay on track. [**We 've already missed our goal once this quarter -- can you make sure we don't miss it again? Rush a donation of whatever you can afford before midnight.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190918_CB_20190918-fr-CB-fellshortbump-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I know I can count on you, friend. Thanks for all you do,
Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team -- I'm sorry to be emailing you again, but it's important. Last night was the deadline for our $250,000 goal, and we fell $29,792 short. We already fell short once this quarter. And with the FEC fundraising deadline quickly approaching, now is not the time to do it again. [**Will you chip in right now to help us raise the remaining $29,792 of our goal by tonight, September 17th, at 11:59 p.m.?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190918_CB_20190918-fr-CB-fellshortbump-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Team, this was an ambitious goal -- the third quarter is historically the toughest time for fundraising. It's probably why you've noticed myself and other candidates writing to you so often. But our campaign has seen real momentum since the last debate, and we need to show the people that this underdog campaign can keep it up through the end of the quarter and all the way to next November. **I 've asked you before, but now is the time I really need you to stand with me.** [**So please, team, help us reach our $250,000 mid-month goal by 11:59 p.m. tonight to keep us on track.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190918_CB_20190918-fr-CB-fellshortbump-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") We can't do it without you,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-september?refcode=em_fr_20190918_CB_20190918-fr-CB-fellshortbump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

"=" I know I can count on you, friend. Thanks for all you do, Cory \---FORWARDED MESSAGE--- Team -- I'm sorry to be emailing you again, but it's important. Last night was the deadline for our $250,000 goal, and we fell $29,792 short. We already fell short once this quarter. And with the FEC fundraising deadline quickly approaching, now is not the time to do it again. "=" Team, this was an ambitious goal -- the third quarter is historically the toughest time for fundraising. It's probably why you've noticed myself and other candidates writing to you so often. But our campaign has seen real momentum since the last debate, and we need to show the people that this underdog campaign can keep it up through the end of the quarter and all the way to next November. I 've asked you before, but now is the time I really need you to stand with me. "=" We can't do it without you, Cory "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. name: Margaret@margaretgood.com
subject: A win for polluters, bad for us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
A few days ago, the Environmental Protection Agency announced staggering rollbacks to Obama-era clean water protections that will put our already vulnerable waterways in even more danger. | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/fioe6CfMMfFQNDkfFtx9XNQoB_UcrHN2GNCxwrY98NA=/zPPpym-cXJ_ToPNSIz_mP89c3da0VNgsSnxGW4DKUU0=)
|
_**The New York Times:**_
**Trump Administration Rolls Back Clean Water Protections**
"Polluters will no longer need a permit to discharge potentially harmful substances into many streams and wetlands"
____________________________________________________________

[**Team, we 're still recovering from Red Tide in Florida. We can't let the Trump Administration make our precious waterways dumping grounds for further pollution. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fioe6CfMMfFQNDkfFtx9XNQoB_UcrHN2GNCxwrY98NA=/zPPpym-cXJ_ToPNSIz_mP89c3da0VNgsSnxGW4DKUU0=) | [MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD »](https://act.myngp.com/el/fioe6CfMMfFQNDkfFtx9XNQoB_UcrHN2GNCxwrY98NA=/zPPpym-cXJ_ToPNSIz_mP89c3da0VNgsSnxGW4DKUU0=)
---

A few days ago, the Environmental Protection Agency announced staggering rollbacks to Obama-era clean water protections that will put our already vulnerable waterways in even more danger.

**President Trump 's reckless and short-sighted changes could usher in the return of Red Tide and Blue-green algae outbreaks that devastated Florida last year.**

In the wake of these environmental disasters, we should be doing everything we can to strengthen protections to our wetlands, streams, and oceans -- not repealing them.

[**Today, I 'm calling on Congress to stop this attack on our waterways and reverse the President's environmental rollbacks. Stand with me to protect our water sources for future generations. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fioe6CfMMfFQNDkfFtx9XNQoB_UcrHN2GNCxwrY98NA=/zPPpym-cXJ_ToPNSIz_mP89c3da0VNgsSnxGW4DKUU0=)

[MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD »](https://act.myngp.com/el/fioe6CfMMfFQNDkfFtx9XNQoB_UcrHN2GNCxwrY98NA=/zPPpym-cXJ_ToPNSIz_mP89c3da0VNgsSnxGW4DKUU0=)
---

It's not just about preserving the beauty of our ecosystem and the security of our natural resources.

If the Trump Administration gets its way, they'll expose our waterways to harmful toxins and pollutants that can affect everything from the fishing industry, to tourism, to our water supply, to our economy.

This is a threat to our way of life in Southwest Florida -- and a threat to every community in our country. We all depend on clean water.

[**Folks, we can 't allow President Trump's EPA to tear down critical water protections. Show your opposition to Trump's dangerous anti-environmental agenda by joining our campaign. >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/fioe6CfMMfFQNDkfFtx9XNQoB_UcrHN2GNCxwrY98NA=/zPPpym-cXJ_ToPNSIz_mP89c3da0VNgsSnxGW4DKUU0=)

[MAKE YOUR VOICE HEARD »](https://act.myngp.com/el/fioe6CfMMfFQNDkfFtx9XNQoB_UcrHN2GNCxwrY98NA=/zPPpym-cXJ_ToPNSIz_mP89c3da0VNgsSnxGW4DKUU0=)
---

Thank you,
_Margaret _

Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
---

Margaret Good for Congress

Sarasota FL 34277 United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: In case you haven't seen...
body:
Dear Peter,

In case you haven't seen,

Marc and his team have been busy engaging with the voters of District 18. We have had the opportunity to speak at a number of events, but more importantly, we have had the opportunity to listen to our neighbors, and to help give back to the community.
DONATE: Before our 9/30 deadline! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927)

** Working With the People
------------------------------------------------------------
Since the beginning of his campaign, Marc has promised to work with and for the people in his community to ensure that they are adequately and fairly represented.
Not only do we meet with as many people as we can to hear their concerns about the district, we also volunteer our help in community projects (https://www.instagram.com/tv/B2GZF-kgArU/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927) whenever we can!
Check us out on Instagram! (https://www.instagram.com/tv/B2GZF-kgArU/?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927)

** Bazaar Times
------------------------------------------------------------

This past weekend, Marc and his volunteers enjoyed the bazaar put on by the St. Peter Apostle Catholic Church. The food was delicious, the dancing was infectious, and the conversation was insightful.

http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927

** Our campaign has been dedicated...
------------------------------------------------------------

to participating and engaging in the community. From block walks to helping with the Settegast garden, we are working to help out our neighbors.

Help us continue to engage with the community by donating here (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927) !
Donate! (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927)
https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927

** Upcoming events
------------------------------------------------------------

Join us any Friday at 7 PM for our volunteer interest meetings (https://business.facebook.com/events/639566429862266/?acontext=%7B%22source%22%3A5%2C%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22main_list%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%5C%22%5C%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D&utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927) , Saturdays for block walks (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927) , or volunteer to host a meet and greet (https://www.marcfloresforcongress.com/volunteer/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=c3fd36e909-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_09_16_02_18&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-c3fd36e909-32267927) !

Thank you for your continued support!

Marc Flores

name: Carly Reilly
subject: Andrew Yang is surging because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
The Wall Street Journal just released a new poll....

| [](https://act.yang2020.com/go/1154?t=1&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt) Friend --

The polls keep coming in and Andrew keeps rising! _The Wall Street Journal_ just released a new poll and we’re at 4% NATIONWIDE. I can’t emphasize enough how big that is for our campaign.

**We know what the Yang Gang is capable of -- so we’re setting a new ambitious goal of $250,000 within the next 48 hours. Hitting this goal is the only way to take on the millions of dollars other candidates are already spending on TV and online.**

Will you help us hit our goal by rushing a contribution below? _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=5&amount=25&express_lane=true&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)
---
| | [$40 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=12&amount=40&express_lane=true&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)
---
| [$65 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=11&amount=65&express_lane=true&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)
---
| | [$75»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=10&amount=75&express_lane=true&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)
---
| [$125 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=9&amount=125&express_lane=true&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=8&amount=25&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)
---
We know Andrew is the candidate to beat Trump. **But we have to hit every goal if we want to send Andrew to the White House and take on the crisis we’re facing.**

Why? To reach as many voters as possible, to put it simply. That’s how you win elections -- talking to voters. And every dollar that you donate to this campaign enables us to talk to more and more voters.

[September will determine the direction of our campaign. If we don’t blow our goals out of the water, we could find ourselves too far behind to catch up. Can you chip in whatever you’re able to do today?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=7&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)

Thank you for everything you do,
Carly Reilly
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Donate now so we can show everyone how powerful this movement is.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/9668?t=6&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=400%2E377263%2ELJzxvt) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: Michael Bennet
subject: I'm asking, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Since I haven't spent a lifetime in politics, many voters are just learning who I am.

So we launched our first major TV ads to make sure Democrats in Iowa and New Hampshire know what I stand for.

I'll be honest, though, it's expensive. But there's too much at stake not to go all in!

[**So I 'm asking you: Every day we air these ads, it helps our standing in the polls -- and that could help get on future debate stages, too. It would mean so much to me if you'd rush $25 to keep these new ads on the air >>**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafa7/134673f2/a9d3dfe/69960ae5/916946664/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-ad?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Despite coming into this race later than most candidates, we've made incredible progress.

When the media said this campaign was a long shot, you helped prove them wrong.

Your support drives this campaign, and I won't stop fighting for this team.

[**I 'm reaching out to you today to ask if you will chip in to my campaign.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafa7/134673f2/a9d3dfe/69960ae4/916946664/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-ad?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

My team and I set a goal to raise another $150,000 before the public reporting deadline this month. We're making great progress, but I need your help to cross the finish line.

As the DNC attempts to eliminate candidates from this race, my campaign is opening new offices, hiring field staff, launching ads, and reaching out to voters every day.

But we need to make sure we've got the resources to keep fueling this campaign!

[**So I 'm asking: Will you rush $25 to keep these crucial TV ads on the air, secure my polling numbers, and help me reach future debates, too?**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbafa7/134673f2/a9d3dfe/69960ae5/916946664/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-ad?refcode=EM_FR_B1_091819_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

clean_body: | | | Since I haven't spent a lifetime in politics, many voters are just learning who I am. So we launched our first major TV ads to make sure Democrats in Iowa and New Hampshire know what I stand for. I'll be honest, though, it's expensive. But there's too much at stake not to go all in! "" Despite coming into this race later than most candidates, we've made incredible progress. When the media said this campaign was a long shot, you helped prove them wrong. Your support drives this campaign, and I won't stop fighting for this team. "" My team and I set a goal to raise another $150,000 before the public reporting deadline this month. We're making great progress, but I need your help to cross the finish line. As the DNC attempts to eliminate candidates from this race, my campaign is opening new offices, hiring field staff, launching ads, and reaching out to voters every day. But we need to make sure we've got the resources to keep fueling this campaign! "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Thanks for your support, Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: We need to retake the Senate and reform the judiciary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10058293/100518325/-1805842515?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVhNDYyYy00YWRhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8BfwpSlGqpQBBmuHDcykAGEWPIDvGXsLWCKK8yB_hI=&refcode=emheader_091819) | | Friend,

David Perdue just wants you to leave him alone.

Just before Republicans forced Brett Kavanaugh’s nomination to a Senate vote, Perdue was caught on camera hiding from women in an airport bathroom to avoid answering questions about Kavanaugh’s nomination. It’s no wonder – it’s hard to answer for Kavanaugh’s temperament, belligerence, and history of alleged sexual assault.

Friend, putting Kavanaugh onto the Supreme Court only scratches the surface of what Republicans have done to the judiciary. **Since President Trump took office, 150 judges have been confirmed to the federal bench.** _That’s more lifetime federal appointments than any president has made in three decades._

That is one of Perdue's proudest accomplishments – helping confirm 150 federal judges ready to uphold Republican legislation restricting the right to vote, the right to abortion, or the right to equal protection under the law, no matter your gender identity or sexual orientation.

This record makes one point crystal clear: Perdue wants to preserve a power structure that has kept men like him at the top of our nation’s social hierarchy since its founding. I’m running to change it.

[**Friend, Georgia deserves a progressive senator who will stand up to Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell. I’m counting on your support to be that senator. We’re facing a major deadline at the end of this month – can you make a donation to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10058294/100518326/1754391651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVhNDYyYy00YWRhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8BfwpSlGqpQBBmuHDcykAGEWPIDvGXsLWCKK8yB_hI=&refcode=em091819-a&noskip=true&refcode2=14ea462c-4ada-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68)

We need to hold our leaders accountable. We need a change in leadership — and in Georgia, that change is possible if we’re willing to act now. Thank you for pitching in.

Yours truly,
Teresa | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/10058295/100518327/1754391651?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNGVhNDYyYy00YWRhLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=k8BfwpSlGqpQBBmuHDcykAGEWPIDvGXsLWCKK8yB_hI=&refcode=em091819-a&noskip=true&refcode2=14ea462c-4ada-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68)**

name: Tommy Greene, SaraGideon.com
subject: Susan Collins outraised us last quarter. Here's how we stop that from happening again:
body:
We have 2 choices.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2d/4bef7a87/68898eb6/287f0d6e/1873358224/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Hi there, it's Tommy, Sara's finance director.
I'm reaching out with an important update about our September fundraising:
We're less than _2 weeks_ out from a very important FEC fundraising deadline, and honestly, we're not where we should be at this point.
Susan Collins outraised us last quarter, and there's a very real chance that will happen again. That's because she's relying almost exclusively on big donations from special interests, and our average donation is much smaller than hers.
**If we 're going to close the gap, we have two choices: either we generate even more donations, or donations we receive have to be _slightly_ larger.**
So if you could make your first online donation -- of even just $3 -- we're going to close the gap, report a great number, and win this race. What do you say?
[**Can you make a $3 donation before our FEC deadline on Monday, September 30th? This is important. If we can close the gap, we can win this race and flip this seat.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2d/4bef7a87/68898eb6/287f0d6d/1873358224/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190918-full")
Susan Collins can just lean on her wealthy special interest donors for help when she needs it. But Sara can't do that. We're not taking any money from corporate PACs, so our ability to put up a strong number after this deadline comes down entirely to you.
All my best,
Tommy Greene
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2d/4bef7a87/68898eb6/287f0d6d/1873358224/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA5MTgtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-sept-deadline?refcode=em190918-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2d/4bef7a87/68898eb6/287f0d6c/1873358224/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802c2d/4bef7a87/68898eb6/287f0d63/1873358224/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: America Next
subject: Bobby Jindal in National Review: Why Trump Needed Someone Like John Bolton
body:
Democrats are alienating voters as people realize how bad this impeachment charade is for the country. [ ](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=48f06c23b44a4b38ac85273e43e4e8de&_e=tFt-92ng2J58kxMGdeHHqhZd668W7dqb5jEuHU7YpV0CToggEXYn5w8pQgfoyxn4MMewMdx0c29how7a2kEbNGtdB_opBxMnb9odsn8wzTzlHY_Wcbw4u3H5GvFM_RWdiil8j5AQwj_shRewwBbW7Oy4db0OKxQ7J6UHuFNO0RDidC6-eaQYI2reynwJVj06_7LxDhacrBmSp631_nvt5zFGbe_tPHOvl6AoCERhF3mNbYB5Cd_iCqe9W0EaNpuyMnD_jb6Oj1_zl_VzzUfv3LXpseHTymu_N74ePOWVvdunYOvutR5E-UsPX6MFOjdAwIJfuQZjRWQbby7UoWAY64Boq93TUginaxNnlbxUVGrQWhTEzt43lLEzYRJBZBYt) **Why Trump Needed Someone Like John Bolton** By BOBBY JINDAL
[September 18, 2019 6:30 AM](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=48f06c23b44a4b38ac85273e43e4e8de&_e=tFt-92ng2J58kxMGdeHHqhZd668W7dqb5jEuHU7YpV0CToggEXYn5w8pQgfoyxn4MMewMdx0c29how7a2kEbNGtdB_opBxMnb9odsn8wzTzlHY_Wcbw4u3H5GvFM_RWdiil8j5AQwj_shRewwBbW7Oy4db0OKxQ7J6UHuFNO0RDxDEbngmofKkZKdWydkM0rNk1iEeG2uJCfBPsg3tkO9VblkEE2mx4258McCd6NQkocXV5VOz2lofTuMnrB7yNfhBkhrkzWjbk3BXqktMHsDstuG6CQBH9VSIBBePAb_T6iyvhyfxxwTEg-hNwzZkuJVwsgJ-BdqRrXsam-X8CgBBaYW0WczD8BG2V9_Pv0mmgorkj_ibHa7fl8SUDb2JKo) _Bolton’s willingness to be honest about the true intentions of our adversaries was a strength and a necessity._ The Reagan administration believed that “personnel is policy” and empowered conservatives by placing their ideological colleagues in positions of power throughout the government bureaucracy. President Trump has at times worked to disprove this maxim, continuing the trend of recent administrations of both parties. The president has centralized power in the White House at the expense of cabinet agencies. He has taken this trend a step farther by concentrating power in his own hands at the expense of the White House chief of staff and other senior advisers.

The reality-TV celebrity who enthusiastically enjoyed announcing firings on national TV was never going to assemble a team of rivals, a collection of distinguished statesmen with independent reputations, ideas, and power bases. Instead, he has delivered a historically high rate of turnover in senior positions, including the chief of staff, national-security adviser, communications director, and cabinet secretaries. Despite his amply demonstrated loyalty, even Vice President Pence has been the subject of rumors about his potential replacement. It is hardly surprising that the man who made the phrase “you’re fired” the climax of his weekly TV show would be willing to change his advisers so casually.

Yet despite the inside-the-Beltway hand-wringing and made-for-cable-TV personnel machinations, Trump has been able to advance his agenda in the legislative, regulatory, and public arenas. His opponents deride him not for being ineffective, but rather for being too energetic in pursuing the conservative and disruptive policy agenda he promised voters. Given the high stakes and bruised egos, no presidential administration is without drama; there is an endless supply of envious Washington denizens willing to second-guess every decision and criticize every official. Yet Trump has also attracted loyal and talented staffers, including Secretaries Mike Pompeo and Alex Azar, who have proven effective at advancing his agenda while also avoiding being damaged by the infighting.

[Read the full op-ed here...](http://mail.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=48f06c23b44a4b38ac85273e43e4e8de&_e=tFt-92ng2J58kxMGdeHHqhZd668W7dqb5jEuHU7YpV0CToggEXYn5w8pQgfoyxn4MMewMdx0c29how7a2kEbNGtdB_opBxMnb9odsn8wzTzlHY_Wcbw4u3H5GvFM_RWdiil8j5AQwj_shRewwBbW7Oy4db0OKxQ7J6UHuFNO0RBuSzOB6Y4QhIiAaxjpUcHlgiUZkBkpgbOATODbJ-R-g9Y94KJcqLdrCnqPQWZBwvxuAnS6Arl1fuefFbHBpC48Trhx-dYW8Nhtb7QcwCjVaHofaqFatG5uyUTrRtaNJXY0zI2DbQO7eF92wOpc_FTqOaH9YjlRbXo1MUCl7XuVjLcQt6aWiNxoHLV-Ptbkm23SkDRhtZky4nqjvjh9sIdr) [ UNSUBSCRIBE HERE ](http://mail.americanxt.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_s=48f06c23b44a4b38ac85273e43e4e8de&_t=OReLwwFU7fW8L-_MUk9_9VMaRWe3yMLSvGT09GVtKPA4h81fk15OkiZ3daF2JJPJvszpkolzzk4sfEJQNpX156itDyF1qhJ-uEXqjCIuS-OQvqie1rcVTOhTkdHVj6Ha_i_POV-vJWrwCnkTbm_CRxXB8TVJGPf3yjDxw7ki9PM%3D) Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by America Next PO Box 320966, Alexandria, VA 22320

name: Tina Smith
subject: Meet my friend, Mark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This election has to be a joint effort...

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-warner-email?refcode=em190917warner-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team,

Meet my friend, Mark Warner.

Mark is a senator from Virginia. And it turns out, we've got a lot in common.

Mark and I both have extreme Republican opponents - Scott Taylor and Jason Lewis - who used to serve in the House. We both are in states that the GOP is pumping money into to turn them red. And we both have to win our seats if Democrats have any hope of flipping the Senate.

**Senator Warner and I are coming together to beat our opponents and save the Senate. Will you join us?**

**[We have to come together to stand up for our progressive values and to move our country forward. Chip in now and we'll split your donation between both of our campaigns.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-warner-email?refcode=em190917warner-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4128d/c1f7015/679d0b8a/1146607b/2002354100/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLXdhcm5lci1lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTA5MTd3YXJuZXItZnVsbCJ9/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-warner-email?refcode=em190917warner-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

This election is about more than just one seat. It's about how we're putting everything we've got into flipping the Senate and demoting Mitch McConnell.

Minnesotans and Virginians don't have to take on this task alone. **Everyone can come together and stand up to our Republican opponents. Will you join us?**

**[Chip in $10 now to both Mark Warner and me, and let's save the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-warner-email?refcode=em190917warner-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks for your help,

Tina

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: POLL: Which issue should Congress tackle first?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, Congress is back in session after their August recess, and Americans are clamoring for them to take action on a range of issues, including gun control, impeachment, voting rights, and government funding. With so many pressing issues for our representatives to tackle, we're interested to see which one tops your list. Please take our one-question poll: **Which issue should Congress tackle first?** **[Environmental regulation](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** **[Gun control](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** **[Government funding](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** **[Healthcare reform](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsC/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** **[Immigration](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsD/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** **[Impeaching Trump](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsA/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** **[Trade policies](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsB/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** **[Other](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd17/6e9863e8/14c9fb9e/1db0dc2e/1578184458/VEsO/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/v0Y9_AC_")** Your response will help us shape our strategy for turning out the vote in 2020, so thanks in advance for answering our survey! Friend,

It's been over four years since I took my famous escalator ride at **Trump Tower in New York City** to announce that I was running for President of the United States. Now, I'm going back to where it all began.

**I 'm having a special breakfast in beautiful NYC at the end of September and I want YOU to be my VIP ALL-ACCESS guest. **

---

We'll cover the flight, hotel, and meal for you and a guest of your choice. We can even take a photo together - all you have to do is show up.

Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. body:
We’ll be upfront: We’re writing to ask you to contribute toward helping us get where we need to be before the FEC deadline at the end of this month. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q32019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.09.18_b1_ft15_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

But before we do that, we thought it might be a good idea to run through our opponent Ross Spano's disastrous record.

Did you know that Ross Spano...
➜ Wants to repeal the Affordable Care Act? Which would leave thousands of Floridians without insurance?
➜ Believes climate change is a joke?
➜ Has an A+ rating from the NRA?
➜ Is one of the most anti-LGBTQ members of Congress, and has authored legislation to allow legal discrimination against people based on sexual orientation?
➜ Is embroiled in a huge scandal about his alleged illegal fundraising tactics?

DONATE TO STOP ROSS SPANO » [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q32019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.09.18_b1_ft15_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

We could go on, and on, and on, and on... Ross Spano is simply not good for Florida families.

Thankfully, we now have an opportunity to kick Spano to the curb with this coming election and elect a real public servant who's ready to take Florida forward -- Adam Hattersley!

If you're ready for a representative with a proven track record of standing up for our country -- both in our nation’s military and our very own State House -- we need you to donate to Adam's campaign to help him meet his goal ahead of the FEC deadline at the end of this month.

[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/hattersley_q32019?refcode=Em_fr_2019.09.18_b1_ft15_all&amount=25.00&recurring=1]

Bye, bye, Ross!
-Team Hattersley

subject: This Deadline is Fast Approaching
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdeoqdl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdeoqdl]
Hey Peter,
I wanted to send a quick note updating you on our campaign.
Since we launched our campaign just over a month ago, we've been floored by your enthusiasm and willingness to step up and fight for change in our community. We're humbled by support from people just like you.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdeoqdl [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdeoqdl]
Our end of quarter filling deadline is fast approaching -- could you help us get to 10,000 unique donors? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdeoqdl]
The 4th district deserves a representative who is more interested in serving the people than wining and dining special interests, high-dollar donors, and corporations. We're in this fight for regular folks and that's why we're going to all 39 counties in Iowa's 4th district, writing no one off, and talking to Republicans, Democrats, and Independents alike. We're running to bring us together rather than focusing on the differences that could drive us apart. To accomplish this, we need to have a strong showing for our end of quarter FEC filing and prove that we're serious about this race.
Could you show your support with a donation today? Anything you can afford helps. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdeoqdl]
We’re in this together,
J.D. Scholten

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: The NYT Kavanaugh Smear Shows Why the Press is the Least-Trusted Institution in America
body:
"A Columbia Journalism Review poll released this year found that half of all Americans have ‘hardly any confidence at all’ in the media..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a55fe194eb&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **The NYT Kavanaugh Smear Shows Why the Press is the Least-Trusted Institution in America**

“A Columbia Journalism Review poll released this year found that half of all Americans have ‘hardly any confidence at all’ in the media, which beat out even Congress as the institution for which the public has the lowest confidence,” Marc Thiessen writes in _The Washington Post_.

“It’s not hard to see why. Last week, CNN reported that the CIA was forced to pull a highly placed source inside the Kremlin because of concerns that President Trump might burn him — when it turns out the decision to extract the source was made before Trump took office because of leaks from senior Obama administration officials.”

Then over the weekend, _The New York Times_ published a story claiming a “previously unreported” sexual assault allegation against Justice Brett Kavanaugh. “One small problem: In the book, Pogrebin and Kelly write that the female student in question ‘refused to discuss the incident’ and that ‘several of her friends said she does not recall it.’” The _Times_ left that part out of its initial story, later adding a “clarification.”

One more thing the _Times_ decided not to mention: The man accusing Kavanaugh in its story “was a member of Bill Clinton’s legal team at the same time that Kavanaugh was working for independent counsel Kenneth Starr” during the Lewinsky investigation.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=78996a1c34&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “President Trump’s immigration policies are steadily curbing the flow of illegal immigrants across our southern border — but some Democrats are determined to keep the humanitarian catastrophe going for as long as possible for political gain and at America’s expense,” National Border Patrol Council President Brandon Judd writes in [_RealClearPolitics_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8fbdd3e4c1&e=3ee4985eea). According to _Politico_ , some House Democrats are looking for “payback” at the President for taking action to address illegal immigration.
---
|
---
| Optimism in America’s construction industry is at an all-time high, Paul Bedard reports for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=109edaabf1&e=3ee4985eea). The U.S. Chamber of Commerce, which helped compile the new index, “noted that the industry is running short of workers and that 61% of commercial contractors plan to hire in the next six months.”
---
|
---
| By applying maximum pressure against terrorist networks, “the American people know President Trump’s priority is the safety of our nation from coast to coast and all of our troops around the world,” Rep. Joe Wilson (R-SC) writes in the [_Aiken Standard_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=805c289631&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=35dec6852e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7cbb80f61c&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=34b317faf1)
---

---

body:

name: Will Van Nuys
subject: A great present for Stephanie
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | I want to make sure you didn't miss the chance to wish our Finance Director Stephanie a happy birthday. She just turned 24 and is working so hard to raise the grassroots money we need to defeat Congressman Katko in 2020.

**[We still need to raise $4,030 more to round out Steph's birthday week. Make a donation of any amount before midnight tonight!](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+We+still+need+to+raise+4030+more+to+roun&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2")

\---Begin forwarded message---**

Today is an important day, our Finance Director Stephanie's birthday! [WISH HER HAPPY BIRTHDAY](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+WISH+HER+HAPPY+BIRTHDAY&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2") Stephanie is turning 24 and has already accomplished so much.

She is an incredible human being, has won 3 national college dance competitions at Saint Joseph's University, and most importantly is a loving cat mom to Luna (who makes occasional much-appreciated appearances here at Conole HQ.)

However, beating Republicans who have unlimited special interest money is a hard job -- especially since we need to report our numbers publicly after our Federal Elections Commission (FEC) filing deadline at the end of this month.

[**That 's why I'm reaching out to surprise her for her birthday by helping her raise $8,000 by the end of this week to stay on track. Chip in $5 right now!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Thatrsquos+why+Irsquom+reaching+out+to+s&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2") [](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. Otherwise, you will be redirected to a donation page._ | [$5](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+5&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2") | [$20](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+20&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2") | [$50](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=50&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=7+-+50&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2")
---|---|---
[$100](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=100&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=8+-+100&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2") | [$250](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=250&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=9+-+250&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2") | [Other](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=10&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=10+-+Other&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2")
Without Stephanie's great work as Finance Director, we would not be able to run our grassroots campaign.

That's why I appreciate you taking the time to wish her a happy birthday by making a contribution. [**Give the present of staying on track for our grassroots fundraising goals with a donation here!**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=11+-+Give+the+present+of+staying+on+track+for&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2")

Yours in service,

Francis

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b133/388db0e9/834c129/609ad1a8/2634652143/VEsHBw/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=12+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b133/388db0e9/834c129/609ad1b7/2634652143/VEsHBg/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=13+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=14+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_1_2")**

We're relying on grassroots supporters like you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: my heart just dropped
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | My heart just dropped. **FIRST:** Trump's campaign flooded my home state with cash to turn us red.

**THEN:** Trump personally held a rally smearing our Democrats and pledging to take this state from us.

**NOW: I just heard Republicans' internal data has shifted. They now see a path to victory here in New Mexico.**

I'm shocked. I'm horrified.

And I refuse to look back and wish I had done more to save New Mexico from Republicans' dangerous grasp.

I need your immediate $5 to WIN my Senate race and HOLD this state for Democrats. | | ****[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190918_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190918_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190918_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")****
---

****[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190918_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")****
---

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190918_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")****
---
I'm counting on you more than you know.

Ben Ray
|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ab/18e32a7f/53256f9f/7bfca6e9/2257429550/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ab/18e32a7f/53256f9f/7bfca6ee/2257429550/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ab/18e32a7f/53256f9f/7bfca6ef/2257429550/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ab/18e32a7f/53256f9f/7bfca6ec/2257429550/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ab/18e32a7f/53256f9f/7bfca6ed/2257429550/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b4ab/18e32a7f/53256f9f/7bfca6e2/2257429550/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125
