name: Eric Hyers
subject: turned heads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
I wanted to take a quick moment to say thank you to everyone who is a part of this campaign. Because of thousands of grassroots donors we actually outraised the sitting governor Matt Bevin in the last
|
---

| | Peter, I wanted to take a quick moment to say thank you to everyone who is a part of this campaign. Because of thousands of grassroots donors we actually outraised the sitting governor Matt Bevin in the last reporting period.

**This is a huge deal.**

Challengers very rarely outraise an incumbent governor and Matt Bevin has been spending his time flying all over the country to hang out with wealthy donors at closed-door fundraisers.**It still wasn 't enough to overcome Andy's grassroots team.**

But make no mistake. Matt Bevin can pour millions of his personal fortune into his campaign whenever he wants. His big-money national allies are spending millions on TV attacking Andy. So we have to keep up the pressure. **[Help us keep fighting back and pitch in today.](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a74/ad6dc73/142040a3/db46233/140881619/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI2NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septy?refcode=20190918nd__266__&amount=5")**

Beating Matt Bevin in fundraising sent a message to everyone watching this race. It turned a lot of heads. Help make sure we have the resources to beat him at the ballot box this November.

Let's go win this thing!

Thanks,
Eric Hyers | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a74/ad6dc73/142040a3/db46233/140881619/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI2NiJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-septy?refcode=20190918nd__266__&amount=5")**

name: Tim Ryan
subject: $281 for every $1 a worker makes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Hi Team,

By now I'm sure you've heard that General Motors workers are on strike nationwide.

This week, I hit the road to meet with some of the more than 48,000 striking GM workers across the country and to join the United Auto Workers International Union picket line.

[I'm going to support the workers who give so much to our community and way of life. Will you add your name in support too?](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d10/5486deaa/3e61787d/dc81162/393341348/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/stand-with-workers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=1+-+Im+going+to+support+the+workers+who+give&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1")

[ADD YOUR NAME HERE](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d10/5486deaa/3e61787d/dc81165/393341348/VEsE/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/stand-with-workers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+HERE&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1")
The CEO of GM currently makes $281 for every dollar of the average worker's salary \-- yet is closing plants to shrink costs.

It's just greed. That's why I continue to stand with American workers, for the middle class, and for good paying jobs accessible to all those willing to work hard.

[Will you join me and add your name before tomorrow to stand in solidarity with American workers?](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d10/5486deaa/3e61787d/dc81164/393341348/VEsF/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/s/stand-with-workers?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=3+-+Will+you+join+me+and+add+your+name+befor&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1")

There is enough of the pie for everyone. Greed should not leave some of us hungry.

Thank you,

Tim

|
---
Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! [**Donate now.**](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d10/5486deaa/3e61787d/dc81167/393341348/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tr-emfooter?amount=5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=4+-+Donate+now&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1")

**We know email can be overwhelming,**
so if you'd like to receive only the most important updates, you can join our email-lite list [here](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d10/5486deaa/3e61787d/dc81166/393341348/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://timryan.cp.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1"), or unsubscribe from all email by [ clicking here.](http://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/m/d7a9d10/5486deaa/3e61787d/dc81169/393341348/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiIzZTYxNzg3ZCIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6ImQ3YTlkMTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ "https://secure.timryanforamerica.com/page/oneclickunsubscribe/3e61787d/d7a9d10?utm_medium=email&utm_source=timryan&utm_content=6+-++clicking+here&utm_campaign=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&source=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1&refcode=TR_EM_PT_ACT_190918_1_1")

body:

|

---

Friends-- For the first time in decades, our Democratic candidates are outraising the Republican majority in the Virginia General Assembly. One thing is clear, we have the momentum on our side. Grassroots donors, like you, are fueling the Democratic momentum. In almost every single race, our Democratic candidates are raising a significant amount of their campaign funds from small donors. **[A donation of $5, $10, $25 or even $100 can go a long way toward getting our candidates the resources they need down the home stretch.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d9/39260142/426bba90/62639bd3/3667917982/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")** The Way Ahead PAC is helping our candidates get there -- we have already donated over $700,000 to secure a Democratic majority. Help us keep that momentum going. **[Can you make one more donation to support a Democratic majority in Virginia?](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21d9/39260142/426bba90/62639bd3/3667917982/VEsF/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vamajority2019")** Thank you for everything you are doing to help us win in November. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Mass incarceration in the U.S. must end
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The U.S. jails more of its citizens than any other nation on Earth \-- our prison population has skyrocketed for decades due to racist laws and policing that have destroyed countless communities. Our system values profiteering off private prisons over reform and rehabilitation. We could be addressing addiction and lowering recidivism rates, but instead we're warehousing people as corporations wring every dollar possible out of them and their families. We need a massive reform of our prison systems at every level \-- federal, state, and local \-- so that we can rebuild these communities and move this country forward. No more private prisons, no more mandatory sentencing, and no more biased sentencing laws that punish people of color more harshly for similar crimes. [**Today, we 're asking you to stand with us and help us reform our prison system -- it is broken and hurting America, and we must do something about it.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd18/6e9863e8/14cbc8c5/1db0dc48/1606319667/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-mass-incarceration/wdtop/") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [SIGN THE PETITION](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd18/6e9863e8/14cbc8c5/1db0dc48/1606319667/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/end-mass-incarceration/wdtop/")

We need a massive reform of our prison systems at every level \-- federal, state, and local \-- so that we can rebuild these communities and move this country forward. No more private prisons, no more mandatory sentencing, and no more biased sentencing laws that punish people of color more harshly for similar crimes. "" Thanks for your support, WDTO Team "" | | | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC PO Box 15320 Washington, DC 20003 ""

name: Greg Stanton
subject: [SIGN ON] support affordable childcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:

Childcare costs in Maricopa County are skyrocketing and it is hurting Arizona families.

**According to a 2018 study by the Arizona Department of Economic Security, the average cost of childcare for a two year-old in Maricopa County costs $200/week!**

[**Add your name if you think Congress should act to make childcare more affordable -- SIGN ON »**](https://act.myngp.com/el/ixVwBG9Pk3LLnfVhwL2IfbxbqqOJt135MYj97qa-T6k=/ufIHF5GJTSRDI8njXHFMra2ecBHhzms8ldT6R82AeCM=)

It is unacceptable that Maricopa County families are paying almost as much for childcare a month as they do on rent or their mortgage.

**That 's why I'm joining with my Democratic colleagues in Congress to make childcare more affordable**

Mary Ellen

name: Cory Booker
subject: When I'm president, I'll make sure that workers are empowered again starting on Day One.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, My grandfather migrated from the Jim Crow South to Detroit, where he landed a union job on the assembly lines during World War II. My father grew up in a segregated mountain town in North Carolina but was able to lift himself and our family into the middle class. For my family, and countless other workers in this country, the story was the same: **if you work hard in America, America will work for you.** But today, for most people in this country, our economy is broken. While the stock market surges to record highs, middle-income families are being held back by stagnant wages and crushing debt. **Today, I 'm releasing my plan to transform our economy to make it work for everyone, not just the wealthy few.** Here's how we do it: 1\. **Empowering workers to raise wages and improve working conditions** by strengthening collective bargaining and supporting state and local efforts to protect workers.
2\. **Extending opportunity for all** by fighting for a $15 minimum wage and overtime protections, providing paid time off when workers are sick or when they need to care for a loved one, and ensuring the ability to work without fear of discrimination or harassment.
3\. **Creating a fairer tax code for workers** that rewards work over wealth by repealing the Trump tax cuts for the wealthiest families and largest corporations. **[If you believe that we need to provide opportunity and justice for every American, add your name next to mine in supporting workers' rights.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-on-to-corys-labor-plan?source=em_pet_20190918_CB_20190918-pet-CB-laborplan-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** In Newark and communities across the country -- from small towns to big cities -- too many Americans are being pushed to the sidelines, struggling to get by and unable to participate in the gains of our broader economic growth. As president, I will work to transform our economy by empowering workers to take collective action, restructuring our laws to make our workplaces fairer and more inclusive, and rebalancing our tax system so that everyone pays -- and receives -- a fair share. **[Will you stand with me in fighting for an economy that leaves no one behind and works for everyone? Add your name here:](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-on-to-corys-labor-plan?source=em_pet_20190918_CB_20190918-pet-CB-laborplan-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** **[https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-on-to-corys-labor-plan](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-on-to-corys-labor-plan?source=em_pet_20190918_CB_20190918-pet-CB-laborplan-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Together,
Cory **[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/page/s/sign-on-to-corys-labor-plan?source=em_pet_20190918_CB_20190918-pet-CB-laborplan-actives_actives_button&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd6/5fca0d19/740209dc/291e4690/3056923249/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd6/5fca0d19/740209dc/291e469f/3056923249/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd6/5fca0d19/740209dc/291e469e/3056923249/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd6/5fca0d19/740209dc/291e469d/3056923249/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd6/5fca0d19/740209dc/291e469c/3056923249/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0bd6/5fca0d19/740209dc/291e4690/3056923249/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: Jonathan Smith
subject: need your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Will you take a quick minute and fill out our survey to help make sure Andy and Jacqueline win and can hit the ground running?
|
---

| | Peter, Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in the entire country. So, it's clear that his approach for Kentucky isn't working.

For the past three and a half years, Matt Bevin has bullied our teachers, tried to strip health care away from thousands of Kentucky families, and failed to create good jobs across communities.

We have a huge opportunity to take our state capitol back this year. Winning this gubernatorial race will make a difference for our commonwealth for years to come. As Andy always says, it's not enough just to win, we have to govern well.

**That 's why we want to hear about the issues that are most important to you and your family. What would make the biggest difference for you when change comes to Frankfort?**

**[Will you take a quick minute and fill out our survey to help make sure Andy and Jacqueline win and can hit the ground running?](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a75/ad6dc73/14216999/db46177/3389666178/VEsH/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://action.andybeshear.com/page/s/ky-issues-survey")**

We cannot miss the opportunity to take back Kentucky from Matt Bevin. Another four years of him as governor will be a disaster for all our working families.

**Make your voice a part of this today.**

Thanks,
Jonathan | | **[DONATE](https://action.andybeshear.com/page/m/52557a75/ad6dc73/14216999/db46174/3389666178/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI2NyJ9/?g=8QZoJjpTVzRcx_d4IN6n_jA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ab-donate?refcode=20190918db__267__&amount=10")**

clean_body: Will you take a quick minute and fill out our survey to help make sure Andy and Jacqueline win and can hit the ground running? | | | Peter, Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in the entire country. So, it's clear that his approach for Kentucky isn't working. For the past three and a half years, Matt Bevin has bullied our teachers, tried to strip health care away from thousands of Kentucky families, and failed to create good jobs across communities. We have a huge opportunity to take our state capitol back this year. Winning this gubernatorial race will make a difference for our commonwealth for years to come. As Andy always says, it's not enough just to win, we have to govern well. That 's why we want to hear about the issues that are most important to you and your family. What would make the biggest difference for you when change comes to Frankfort? "" We cannot miss the opportunity to take back Kentucky from Matt Bevin. Another four years of him as governor will be a disaster for all our working families. Make your voice a part of this today. Thanks, Jonathan | | "" | "" "" Beshear/Coleman 2019 P.O. Box 4278 Louisville, Kentucky 40204 "" | | Contributions or gifts to the Beshear/Coleman 2019 campaign are not tax deductible. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Thanks to Trump, fewer Americans have health insurance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, The number of Americans without health insurance coverage has risen for the first time since 2009 \-- according to the Census Bureau, the number of uninsured Americans rose by 2 million in 2018, bringing the total to 8.5 percent of the population. The Census Bureau credits this to people getting kicked off public programs such as Medicaid \-- which just so happens to be one of Trump's favorite targets for budget cuts. His draconian healthcare policies put millions of Americans at risk because they aren't able to afford basic healthcare and now don't qualify for public assistance. Democratic candidates like Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren have proposed bold single-payer, Medicare-for-all plans that eliminate private health insurance and create universal coverage. Voters are split on the issue, so we want to hear from YOU: **Do you support universal healthcare?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1a/6e9863e8/14c57fd2/1db0dc5c/2144195595/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/QqwHB6xg") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1a/6e9863e8/14c57fd2/1db0dc5c/2144195595/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/QqwHB6xg") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdd1a/6e9863e8/14c57fd2/1db0dca2/2144195595/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=WDTO20190918c.ND-b&refcode2=5G6ssKgIzdVAAmhPLra1")
---

name: Tina Smith
subject: [Action Needed] Tell Mitch McConnell to vote on election security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Since 2016, not nearly enough has been done to make our elections more secure. Mitch McConnell blocked two bills earlier this year that would safeguard our elections. We can't allow McConnell to keep

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190918electionsecurity-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team -

With so much at stake in 2020, one of my top concerns is the security of our elections.

We know that Russia meddled in our elections in 2016, and foreign powers are already attempting to mess with our election in 2020. And still, not nearly enough has been done to make our democracy safer.

Mitch McConnell blocked two bills earlier this year that would safeguard our elections. **The foundations for a free democracy are vulnerable going into 2020, and we can't allow McConnell to continue to put us at risk.**

**[Friend, join me in telling Mitch McConnell to hold a vote on election security immediately. Add your name right now>>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412a2/c1f7015/67987a2d/1146627a/4075250921/VEsE/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-we-must-protect-our-democracy-mitch-mcconnell-must-bring-election-security-legislation-to-a-vote-immediately?referrer=group-tinasmithmn&source=20190904_ElectionSecurity_Smith&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019")** **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412a2/c1f7015/67987a2d/1146627a/4075250921/VEsF/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-we-must-protect-our-democracy-mitch-mcconnell-must-bring-election-security-legislation-to-a-vote-immediately?referrer=group-tinasmithmn&source=20190904_ElectionSecurity_Smith&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019")** We can't repeat the mistakes of 2016 four years later. A democracy is built on the foundation of free and fair elections. If we don't defend against foreign influence, the very foundation of America is at risk.

Today, election systems across the country are still exposed to Russia and other foreign nations. **The facts are clear, and we can't let Mitch McConnell get in the way of our security.**

**[We can't push this back any longer. Add your name to tell Mitch McConnell to bring election security to a vote immediately.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc412a2/c1f7015/67987a2d/1146627a/4075250921/VEsC/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://actionnetwork.org/petitions/sign-the-petition-we-must-protect-our-democracy-mitch-mcconnell-must-bring-election-security-legislation-to-a-vote-immediately?referrer=group-tinasmithmn&source=20190904_ElectionSecurity_Smith&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019")**

Fighting with you,

Tina | **U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-sept2019?refcode=em190918electionsecurity-full-biobox&amount=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")
---

subject: we just checked our ActBlue progress...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
No no no, team. We just checked our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091819_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Help Ed reach our $50,000 FEC deadline goal by donating $27 or more before midnight!](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091819_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal this week, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. Will you stand with Ed today and pitch in $27 or more to help us reach our goal?](http://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-september2019-weekly?refcode=EM-091819_3&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

body:

| | **TRUMP: I am going to take New Mexico from Democrats** [**_This is the most important ask I 've ever made of you. Trump just swooped into my home state, held a massive rally, and pledged to turn our state red. I need a historic response -- 1,000 more gifts before midnight -- to make his rally backfire. >>_**](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20190918_em_fr_b2_lujan_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I'm asking you to make a critical choice in this moment:

\-- We can either let Trump come into our house, turn this state red, and sabotage our chance to flip the Senate.

**\-- Or we can rise up, send a historic Democratic response, and show Trump that he will NEVER take this state from us.**

Let me be clear: New Mexico is absolutely crucial to winning a Democratic Senate.

I will fight until my last breath to defend it from Trump's snatches.

I'm counting on Democrats nationwide to have our back right now. We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Rivers of drug-fueled money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1ff/6cd27893/51a8236c/15871dc3/3015071808/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Purdue Pharma had a big plan. Hook people on opioids like OxyContin. Lean on groups like the World Health Organization to look the other way. And then turn their backs on the victims when people became addicted and started dying. **That's the opioid crisis in America, and it's a signal that health care in our country is in grave danger.** It's a multi-pronged assault:
* Companies like Purdue get people hooked on their drugs, then try to weasel out of responsibility for a crisis they helped cause.

* Other drug companies develop life-saving medications, but then jack up the prices and hold patients hostage to their profits.

* They bankroll Republican campaigns, funding people who promise to cut regulations on health care and protect Big Pharma.

* Industry executives, lobbyists, and insiders are appointed to major positions of power, who spend their days undermining our health care system.

Americans can't afford for Big Pharma to call the shots anymore. I've proposed solutions like barring them from gouging Americans with prices far higher than they charge in other countries, and making them pay for an opioid treatment surge. [**Want to help hold Big Pharma accountable for all they've done? Elect Democrats in 2020. Donate today, help us blast through our September online goal, and let's win back the Senate.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2d1ff/6cd27893/51a8236c/15871dc0/3015071808/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-09-18-pharma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") And when we do, we'll get big change: policies that put our health ahead of Big Pharma's profits! name: Mark Warner
subject: these folks have heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
For the past couple weeks, I've been traveling across Virginia, campaigning alongside some truly dedicated Democrats running for the General Assembly.
|
---
| | Derek, for the past couple weeks, I've been traveling across Virginia, campaigning alongside some truly dedicated Democrats running for the General Assembly.

I gotta tell you: these folks have _heart_ and they're working their fingers to the bone every day. That's how **strongly** they believe in Virginia's future.

Their dedication and passion give me hope, and I hope they give you hope too. **I 'm confident that these great candidates, with our help, _can_ flip the House of Delegates and Virginia Senate on November 5th.**

And that's just the start! I'm up for re-election next year, but if I can win my own race, that'll put us that much closer to flipping the Senate and stopping Donald Trump's destructive agenda.

**Will you donate today to help me defeat my Republican challenger? He 'll only act as a rubber stamp for Donald Trump's destructive agenda and Virginia deserves far better than that! ** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c5/53d9897e/52a47fac/1c8e077a/2686065194/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fighter?refcode=20190918nd__230__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** I'd like to close by sharing a few photos from some recent campaign stops.

Here's a photo in Arlington supporting Delegate Hala Ayala, alongside Emily's List Executive Director Emily Cain. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c5/53d9897e/52a47fac/1c8e0764/2686065194/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fighter?refcode=20190918nd__230__&refcode2=img1&amount=5")
---
In Virginia Beach with our great slate of candidates.
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c5/53d9897e/52a47fac/1c8e0763/2686065194/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fighter?refcode=20190918nd__230__&refcode2=img2&amount=5")
---
And in Blacksburg with Delegate Chris Hurst and a whole lot of Virginia Tech and Radford University Young Democrats (these students were, frankly, inspiring to me)!
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c5/53d9897e/52a47fac/1c8e0762/2686065194/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fighter?refcode=20190918nd__230__&refcode2=img3&amount=5")
---
From NOVA to Blacksburg, to Richmond, Hampton Roads and everywhere in between, it's a privilege to visit every corner of our great Commonwealth supporting these inspiring candidates. They're the ones who are going to flip the General Assembly in 2019. And together, we're going to work to keep Virginia blue in 2020.

**[I'm going to keep working to make a change this year in Virginia, but I need your help to make sure we win in 2020 and retake the Senate. Please consider donating -- whatever you can afford -- to my campaign.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d0c5/53d9897e/52a47fac/1c8e0761/2686065194/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIzMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-fighter?refcode=20190918nd__230__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Thank you for everything,
Mark

Here's a photo in Arlington supporting Delegate Hala Ayala, alongside Emily's List Executive Director Emily Cain. | "" In Virginia Beach with our great slate of candidates. "" And in Blacksburg with Delegate Chris Hurst and a whole lot of Virginia Tech and Radford University Young Democrats (these students were, frankly, inspiring to me)! "" From NOVA to Blacksburg, to Richmond, Hampton Roads and everywhere in between, it's a privilege to visit every corner of our great Commonwealth supporting these inspiring candidates. They're the ones who are going to flip the General Assembly in 2019. And together, we're going to work to keep Virginia blue in 2020. "" Thank you for everything, Mark ** ""** | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Stephanie Garvey (via Team Conole)
subject: Virgo season
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| | | Wow! I can't believe so many people stepped up and contributed to Francis' campaign in honor of my birthday this week! This will make my job a little bit easier heading into our FEC deadline at the end of the month.

It's great to work for someone as passionate as Francis is -- but defeating the GOP in 2020 will be super tough. It's my job to make sure we can do it.

**[So, will you help us reach our $8,000 goal by midnight tonight? Your support now is crucial before our FEC filing deadline.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+So+will+you+help+us+reach+our+8000+goal+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3")

[https://go.conoleforcongress.com/birthday-week](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-steph-birthday?amount=5&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+httpsgoconoleforcongresscombirthdayweek&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3")**

Thanks so much again for making my birthday so special. Now, let's finish this week strong!

-- Stephanie
Francis' Finance Director

|
---|---|---

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b10c/388db0e9/834f3cc/609ad02a/1862518641/VEsF/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b10c/388db0e9/834f3cc/609ad029/1862518641/VEsC/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.%3D/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3")**

But, if you wish to no longer receive emails from us, you can **[unsubscribe here.](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b10c/388db0e9/834f3cc/609ad037/1862518641/VEsA/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=6+-+unsubscribe+here&utm_campaign=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&source=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3&refcode=FC_EM_FR_30DO_190918_2_3")** Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._

**McConnell has pledged to block any legislation on climate change and confirm as many ultra-conservative Supreme Court Justices like Brett Kavanaugh as possible.**
That's why 314 Action is investing early in swing states like Arizona and Colorado -- _We need to make sure these states go blue in 2020._
↓ These Democratic scientists can flip the Senate ↓
[](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_battlegroundsenate?refcode=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1")**Mark Kelly (AZ-Sen):** Mark is a former NASA astronaut and naval aviator running in one of the only TOSS-UP Senate races in the country. His opponent just emerged as the top Republican Senate fundraiser in the nation and Mitch McConnell is already aggressively attacking him. [**He isn 't taking a DIME of corporate PAC money, so we need to help him fight back!**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_battlegroundsenate?refcode=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+He+isnrsquot+taking+a+DIME+of+corporate+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1")
[](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_battlegroundsenate?refcode=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1")**John Hickenlooper (CO-Sen):** Hick is the former Governor of Colorado and a geologist by training who **achieved near universal health care access and universal background checks** during his tenure. He also led efforts to ensure Colorado will meet or exceed the Paris Agreement targets. [**He 's not taking any corporate PAC money and his opponent has already raised $8 MILLION -- so we can't let him down.**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_monthly_battlegroundsenate?refcode=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&amount=27&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=13+-+Hersquos+not+taking+any+corporate+PAC+mo&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1")
Mark Kelly and John Hickenlooper aren't taking ANY corporate PAC money. That means they will be accountable to voters -- NOT special interests. 314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47ae/4bd7760e/42957ef5/77e0d3dd/3216265485/VEsHDQ/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=18+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1")
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb47ae/4bd7760e/42957ef5/77e0d3dc/3216265485/VEsHDA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/less-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=19+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1&source=314_EM_FR_190918_SenChallengeSlate_U2_X1")
